items.title: Inside Author Mark Manson’s Quest to Create an AI Life Coach That Doesn’t Suck
items.description: The self-help guru is among the first to launch an AI coaching app. He won’t be the last.

items.title: Struggling With Budgets? These Fast-Growth CEOs Share Their Capital-Saving Strategies That Actually Work

items.title: More Than a Century Ago, Thomas Edison Imagined a Better Battery. Now Scientists Are Making It Real

items.title: A Cheaper, Cold‑Proof EV Battery Is Coming to Cars This Year—and It Doesn’t Use Lithium
items.description: The technology promises better cold-weather performance, lower costs, and fewer global trade problems.

items.title: Neuroscience Says This Is What Really Happens to Your Brain When You Don’t Get Enough Sleep
items.description: Don’t sleep on sleep. It’s part of what makes everything else possible.
